Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.liftsOpen: 6 lifts, Rope Tow and Space Worm
nubsNob.xcTrails: All trails will be groomed this morning to pack trails before the heavy snow.
nubsNob.comments: A winter storm warning is in effect for our area. Snow is falling and is forecast to continue coming down at a rate of 1 to 2 inches per hour. All of the slopes were groomed last night but it will definitely be a powder day. Expect a strong wind from the East for the majority of the day. No Nastar today due to snow conditions. The soup of the day is Beef Barley. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with food service and an espresso bar. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Drive safe and make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
